ddls:
CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "memid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "surname" TEXT /* Member's surname */,
  "firstname" TEXT /* Member's first name */,
  "address" TEXT /* Member's residential address */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Postal code for the member's address */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Member's telephone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Member's email address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Member's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Member's gender */,
  "member_since" TEXT /* Date when the member joined the gym */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login to the member portal */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "recommendedby" INTEGER /* ID of the member who referred this member */,
  "joindate" TEXT /* Date the member joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("memid")
)

CREATE TABLE "membership_types" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership type */,
  "membership_name" TEXT /* Name of the membership type (e.g., Basic, Premium) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the membership benefits */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Detailed list of benefits */,
  "price" REAL /* Monthly price of the membership */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Discount rate for the membership */,
  "max_guests" INTEGER /* Maximum number of guests allowed per visit */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the membership in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "membership_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the status record */,
  "memid" INTEGER /* ID of the member to whom this status belongs */,
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the membership type */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the membership */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the membership */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the membership is up for renewal */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Current payment status (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the membership (active, expired, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_membership_status_memid FOREIGN KEY ("memid") REFERENCES members ("memid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_membership_status_membership_id FOREIGN KEY ("membership_id") REFERENCES membership_types ("membership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referrals" (
  "referral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the referral record */,
  "referrer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who made the referral */,
  "new_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new member being referred */,
  "incentive_type" TEXT /* Type of incentive offered */,
  "incentive_value" REAL /* Value of the incentive */,
  "referral_date" TEXT /* Date when the referral was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_new_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_member_id") REFERENCES members ("memid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_referrer_id FOREIGN KEY ("referrer_id") REFERENCES members ("memid")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication log */,
  "memid" INTEGER /* ID of the member being communicated with */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who initiated the communication */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication event */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the communication response (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content or description of the communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_memid FOREIGN KEY ("memid") REFERENCES members ("memid")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "memid" INTEGER /* ID of the member making the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, pending) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction identifier from the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_memid FOREIGN KEY ("memid") REFERENCES members ("memid")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "memid" INTEGER /* ID of the member performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., gym visit, class attended) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "feedback_rating" REAL /* Member's rating of the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_memid FOREIGN KEY ("memid") REFERENCES members ("memid")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, manager, member) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON field storing specific permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
